title.en: Lech Lecha: Leaving Everything Behind to Follow God
title.zh: 利克利卡：离开一切跟随神
title.he: לך לך: לעזוב הכל כדי לללכת אחרי אלוהים

summary.en: Abraham's radical leap of faith in leaving his homeland — and what it means for anyone starting a new spiritual journey.
summary.zh: 亚伯拉罕离开家园的激进信仰跨越——以及它对开始新属灵旅程的人意味着什么。
summary.he: הקפיצה האמונית הרדיקלית של אברהם בעזיבת מולדתו — ומה זה אומר לכל מי שמתחיל מסע רוחני חדש.

chinese_dynasties.connection: Abraham's historical period corresponds to China's Shang Dynasty

header_image_prompt: A serene Chinese shan shui (山水) landscape painting depicting a lone traveler with a walking staff journeying across a vast mountain valley. Traditional ink wash technique with muted earth tones of sage green, warm beige, and soft gray. In the foreground, an elderly bearded figure (Abraham) in flowing robes stands at the edge of a cliff overlooking an endless vista of rolling hills and distant peaks. A small caravan of camels and tents is visible in the valley below. The sky shows subtle touches of golden light breaking through misty clouds, symbolizing divine guidance. The composition evokes themes of trust, journey, and spiritual calling. Style: classical Chinese brushstroke painting reminiscent of Song Dynasty landscape masters.

biblical_references.text: Now the Lord said unto Abram: 'Get thee out of thy country, and from thy kindred, and from thy father's house, unto the land that I will show thee.'

And I will make of thee a great nation, and I will bless thee, and make thy name great; and be thou a blessing. And I will bless them that bless thee, and him that curseth thee will I curse; and in thee shall all the families of the earth be blessed.

author: Torah Light AI Writer
target_audience: Chinese native Mandarin speakers with no prior Jewish knowledge
cultural_parallels: Chinese merchant ventures on ancient trade routes
Laozi's teachings about leaving societal conventions
Chinese immigrant experiences leaving ancestral lands
Confucian emphasis on moral calling over conventional career
